musicServices.title: Hook Writing
musicServices.description: Catchy, radio-ready hooks crafted to elevate your track. Delivered in 48–72 hours with two revision rounds included.

musicServices.title: Feature Verse
musicServices.description: A full feature verse from Cjones — written and recorded to fit your beat and vibe. Licensing rights included.

musicServices.title: Beat Collaboration
musicServices.description: Co-produce a track together. Bring your concept, your stems, or just a vibe — Cjones will build around your vision.
